SEARCH

Uses of Class
com.nib.commons.storage.NInteger

Packages that use NInteger
Package
Description
com.nib.commons.io
Provides core Input/Output (I/O) components and abstractions for handling various file organizations and access methods.
com.nib.commons.io.vsam
Provides classes and interfaces for emulating VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) file organizations.
com.nib.commons.storage
Provides components for managing memory storage and simulating mainframe-like data types.
com.nib.scripting.utils.dbutils
DB API
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.commands
CICS-like commands API classes.
com.nib.supernaut.jms.api
Supernaut JMS API
com.nib.supernaut.values
Value objects and constants for Supernaut.

  • Uses of NInteger in com.nib.commons.io

    Methods in com.nib.commons.io with parameters of type NInteger
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AbstractFile
    AbstractFile.recordIs(AbstractNField record, NInteger recordLength)
    Assigns a record to the file using the specified field and record length.
    AbstractFile
    AbstractFile.recordIs(AbstractNField record, NInteger recordLength, EncodingType encoding)
    Assigns a record to the file using the specified field, length and encoding.
    SequentialFile
    SequentialFile.recordIs(AbstractNField record, NInteger recordLength)
    Sets the record field and length for the file.
    void
    Record.setRecordLengthField(NInteger reclen)
    Sets the record length field to the given AbstractNInteger.

  • Uses of NInteger in com.nib.commons.io.vsam

    Methods in com.nib.commons.io.vsam with parameters of type NInteger
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractEntrySequentialFile.read(AbstractNField into, NInteger rba)
    Reads a record from the sequential file using the specified field and relative buffer address (RBA).
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractEntrySequentialFile.read(AbstractNField into, NInteger rba, boolean equal, boolean update)
    Reads a record from the sequential file using the specified parameters and stores the data into the provided field.
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractEntrySequentialFile.read(NInteger rba)
    Reads a record from the sequential file using the specified RBA.
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractEntrySequentialFile.read(NInteger rba, boolean equal)
    Reads a record from the sequential file based on the specified RBA and equality condition.
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractEntrySequentialFile.read(NInteger rba, boolean equal, boolean update)
    Reads a record from the sequential file using the specified Relative Buffer Address (RBA), allowing control over equality conditions and update mode.
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractRecordRelativeFile.read(AbstractNField into, NInteger rrn)
    Reads a record from the file into the specified data field based on the given relative record number (RRN).
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractRecordRelativeFile.read(AbstractNField into, NInteger rrn, boolean equal, boolean update)
    Reads a record from the file into the specified data field based on the given relative record number (RRN), equality condition, and update flag.
    EntrySequentialFile
    EntrySequentialFile.recordIs(AbstractNField record, NInteger recordLength)
    Sets the record and its associated length for processing in this EntrySequentialFile instance.
    KeySequentialFile
    KeySequentialFile.recordIs(AbstractNField record, NInteger recordLength)
    Sets the record for the KeySequentialFile instance with the specified AbstractNField as the record and NInteger as the record length.
    RecordRelativeFile
    RecordRelativeFile.recordIs(AbstractNField record, NInteger recordLength)
    Sets the record and record length for the current instance of RecordRelativeFile and returns the instance itself.
    AbstractEntrySequentialFile
    AbstractEntrySequentialFile.relativeKeyIs(NInteger relativeKey)
    Sets the relative key for the current instance of AbstractEntrySequentialFile.
    EntrySequentialFile
    EntrySequentialFile.relativeKeyIs(NInteger relativeKey)
    Sets the relative key for the current EntrySequentialFile instance.
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractEntrySequentialFile.start(NInteger rba, KeyIs mode)
    Starts the file browse from the specified RBA
    FileIOResponse
    AbstractRecordRelativeFile.start(NInteger rrn, KeyIs mode)
    Starts the file browse from the specified RRN

  • Uses of NInteger in com.nib.commons.storage

    Subclasses of NInteger in com.nib.commons.storage
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    NInt16
    Represents a signed 16-bit integer (2-byte) data type.
    class 
    NInt32
    Represents a 32-bit signed integer within the numeric data types hierarchy.
    class 
    NInt64
    The NInt64 class represents a 64-bit signed integer data type.
    class 
    NPointer
    Persistent pointer to a memory location.
    class 
    NUInt16
    The NUInt16 class represents an unsigned 16-bit integer.
    class 
    NUInt32
    The NUInt32 class represents a 32-bit unsigned integer in a specific data area structure.
